arts.ttl: Gabriel Jesus a huge concern as Arsenal miss major opportunity against Fulham
arts.sum: Opportunity missed for Arsenal as one player’s form is a real concern Sunday’s draw at Fulham felt like a massive opportunity missed for Arsenal after Liverpool’s game at Everton had been postponed earlier in the weekend. arts.ttl: Premier League announce TV fixture changes including huge Man Utd and Liverpool games
arts.sum: Manchester United have been selected for three TV matches in February, while Arsenal, Liverpool and Manchester City all have key fixtures being televised that month
